publishedAbstract: In some instances it may be necessary to set the debugging level higher on the NooBaa resources when capturing must gathers for BugZilla or Jira cases interactions with engineering. * Current supported log debug levels: ~~~ 1. `default_level`- default debugging. 2. `warn`- warning/errors debugging only. 3. `nsfs`- additional `nsfs` detailed debugging. 4. `all`- all detailed debugging. ~~~ * The above information can be found in this external link: *["NooBaa-core docs / Logging.md"](https://github.com/noobaa/noobaa-core/blob/89c2b69e0faf7f44643b99d53dd0f2836cf4bd6c/docs/NooBaaNonContainerized/Logging.md?plain=1#L67-L74)*
publishedTitle: Setting Debugging Levels For NooBaa - OpenShift Data Foundation
